contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: USD
- Amount: 15
- Description: Fix beta analytics leakage — Facebook Pixel hostname guard
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/127
  
  Details:
  Identified that Facebook Pixel (ID 2896386767418228) was leaking from beta.agroverse.shop into production analytics. The google-analytics.js already had a hostname guard, but facebook-pixel.js and facebook-pixel-events.js did not.
  
  Investigation:
  - Checked beta.truesight.me — GA4 gtag already guarded, clean
  - Checked beta.agroverse.shop — GA4 guarded, but Facebook Pixel fired PageView on every beta visit
  - Checked CI Playwright tests — confirmed they run against beta.agroverse.shop, but the fix covers them too
  
  Fix:
  - Opened PR #127 on agroverse_shop_beta adding hostname guards to facebook-pixel.js and facebook-pixel-events.js
  - Merged and auto-deployed to beta.agroverse.shop via GitHub Pages
  - Verified live — guard is in place
  
  Gary Teh: investigation, direction, QA
  Sophia (Autopilot): code fix, PR, merge, deploy verification
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh, Sophia (TrueSight Autopilot)
- TDG Issued: 25
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
--------
